name: Neon
philosophy: A serverless Postgres console rendered as a quietly-confident developer-tools brand — graphite canvas, electric green voltage, branching diagrams as the real hero.

design_language.motion_signature: Sub-300ms ease-out fades; signature green branch-arrow that animates from the wordmark on CTA hover.

trademark_signals: Green-on-graphite is the entire brand voltage — no second accent on marketing
Branch-diagram visuals (Postgres branching) used as actual product chrome, never illustration
Mono inline in body callouts — code lives at sentence level
Pricing rows show hover-glow with a 1px green underline, not a row fill
Lowercase wordmark with single green dot accent
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce purple/blue gradients on the hero
Don't use 3D illustrations or rendered geometry
Don't apply drop shadows to cards on the graphite canvas
Don't render a light-mode hero on the homepage
